title: YLAB 300 Green Bauble Hooks – Ornament Hangers for Christmas Tree Decorations – Assorted Sizes 3.5cm & 6cm – Strong, Reusable Wire Hooks for Hanging Baubles, Ornaments & Festive Décor
features: 🎄 Assorted Sizes – 3.5cm & 6cm Includes 150 small hooks (3.5cm) and 150 large hooks (6cm) – perfect for creating a full, layered look by hanging decorations of all sizes at different depths.
Strong Metal Wire Construction Made from high-quality metal, these hooks are tough and sturdy – ideal for holding heavier baubles and ornaments securely on your Christmas tree.
🟢 Green Finish to Blend Naturally Each hook is coated in festive green, helping them blend seamlessly into your Christmas tree branches for a clean, professional look.
🔁 C-Shaped & Easy to Use Features a simple C-shape design that makes it quick and easy to attach and remove baubles without damaging the tree or decorations – no fiddly fasteners needed!

🎅 Effortless Decorating for Tree or Garland Whether you're decorating a Christmas tree, wreath or festive garland, these hooks make it super easy to hang baubles, tags, lights and more. A reusable essential for the festive season!
description: 🎄 Make Decorating Your Tree Effortless with 300 Green Metal Bauble Hooks 🎄 Decorating your Christmas tree has never been easier! This set of 300 green metal bauble hooks is perfect for quickly and securely hanging all your favourite decorations. With an assortment of 150 small (3.5cm) and 150 large (6cm) hooks, you'll have the flexibility to hang baubles, ornaments, garlands, tags, and more – no matter the size or weight. Each hook is crafted from strong, bendable metal wire with a festive green finish that blends seamlessly into your Christmas tree or garland. The simple C-shaped design allows you to easily attach and remove decorations without damaging branches or ornaments. Whether you're decorating a large Christmas tree or a festive garland, these reusable hooks will save you time and effort. You can even gently bend them for a more secure fit – ideal for delicate or heavy decorations that need a bit of extra hold. 🎁 Why You'll Love These Ornament Hooks: ✅ Sturdy & Reusable – Made from high-quality metal to last year after year ✅ Two Practical Sizes – 3.5cm and 6cm hooks for different decorations ✅ C-Shaped & Easy to Use – Quickly attach or remove ornaments ✅ Green Finish Blends In – Keeps your tree looking neat and tidy ✅ Perfect for Trees, Garlands, and Wreaths – A must-have Christmas essential Add a professional touch to your festive decorating and keep your ornaments safe with these durable and discreet bauble hooks – the smart way to make your Christmas sparkle ✨
